title: ATEP Passport Portability Envelope
description: A signed, self-contained envelope for transporting an ATEP passport across platform boundaries. Wraps either a native ATEP payload or a W3C Verifiable Credential (VC) representation of the passport. The receiving platform MUST verify the issuer signature before consuming any data from the envelope.

envelope_version.description: Version of the portability envelope format.

envelope_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this specific envelope instance. Used for replay prevention — verifiers SHOULD cache seen envelope IDs and reject duplicates.

format.description: The format of the payload field. 'atep_native' contains a raw ATEP full or public passport object. 'w3c_vc' contains a W3C Verifiable Credential wrapping the ATEP passport.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this envelope was created and signed by the issuing platform. Verifiers SHOULD reject envelopes where issued_at is older than a configurable staleness threshold (recommended: 24 hours).

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which this envelope MUST be rejected, even if the signature is valid. Short TTLs (e.g. 24 hours) help prevent replay attacks.

issuer.description: Identity of the platform that created and signed this envelope.

platform_url.description: Canonical HTTPS URL of the issuing platform. Receivers MUST verify this matches their trusted issuer allowlist.

did.description: Decentralized Identifier (DID) of the issuing platform. Used for W3C VC verification. Typically did:web:<domain>.

public_key_url.description: HTTPS URL where the issuer's current signing public key can be retrieved. Verifiers fetch this to validate the signature. SHOULD resolve to a JWK Set or PEM-encoded Ed25519 public key.

subject.description: Minimal public identity of the agent this envelope belongs to. Does not include the internal agent_id.

passport_id.description: The passport_id of the enclosed passport, for easy correlation without parsing the payload.

trust_tier.description: The agent's trust tier at envelope issuance time. Exposed at envelope level so receivers can perform a quick trust check without parsing the full payload.

payload.description: The enclosed passport data. Structure depends on the 'format' field: when format='atep_native', this is a full or public ATEP passport object. When format='w3c_vc', this is a W3C Verifiable Credential object wrapping the passport.

oneOf.description: W3C Verifiable Credential wrapping an ATEP passport (w3c_vc format)

signature.description: Cryptographic signature over the canonical JSON of the envelope body (all fields except this 'signature' object itself).

algorithm.description: The signing algorithm used. HMAC-SHA256 is the minimum required for ATEP Core conformance. Ed25519 is recommended for ATEP Portable conformance.

value.description: Base64url-encoded signature value. For HMAC-SHA256: HMAC over canonical_json(envelope_body). For Ed25519: signature over SHA-512 of canonical_json(envelope_body).

key_id.description: Optional identifier of the specific signing key used, for platforms that rotate keys. Verifiers can use this to fetch the correct public key from issuer.public_key_url.

W3CVerifiableCredential.title: W3C Verifiable Credential Wrapper
W3CVerifiableCredential.description: ATEP passport wrapped in the W3C Verifiable Credentials Data Model v2.0 format. Enables ATEP passports to be processed by any standards-compliant VC library.

@context.description: JSON-LD contexts. MUST include the W3C credentials v2 context and the ATEP context.

type.description: VC type array. MUST include both 'VerifiableCredential' and 'AgentExecutionPassport'.

id.description: Globally unique URI identifying this VC instance.

validFrom.description: ISO 8601 datetime from which this credential is valid.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 datetime after which this credential should no longer be accepted.

credentialSubject.description: The entity described by this credential — the AI agent and its ATEP passport.

id.description: Optional DID for the agent itself, if the agent has been issued a DID.

atep_passport.description: The embedded ATEP passport. Typically the public passport format to avoid exposing internal identifiers.

proof.description: Linked Data Proof for this VC.

created.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the proof was created.

verificationMethod.description: DID URL pointing to the public key used to create this proof.

proofPurpose.description: The intended purpose of this proof.

proofValue.description: Base58btc-encoded Ed25519 signature of the canonical document.
